# LuauX

> LuauX is a hosted control panel for Minecraft auto-message bots and Discord automation plugins (auto-spam, auto-reply, verification). Crypto billing, live console, Discord login.

## Pages

- [Home](https://luaux.wtf/): Product overview, features, pricing, FAQ
- [Sitemap](https://luaux.wtf/sitemap.xml)

## Product

- Minecraft bot fleets with live logs and humanized messaging
- Discord plugins: channel spam, DM auto-reply, server verification
- Plans from $7/mo · paid with crypto · Discord OAuth sign-in

## Contact

- Discord: https://discord.gg/n6nEcvwzYQ
- Telegram: https://t.me/luauxx
